analysis.reasoning: Core message: COVID-19 affects everyone globally; the EU and its Member States, acting as #TeamEurope, are redirecting €15.6 billion to support partner countries worldwide, stressing being #StrongerTogether. EU1 (successful story): While positive, it doesn’t reference history or overcoming past obstacles; not clearly promoted. EU2 (EU is united): The use of #TeamEurope and joint action by the EU and Member States implies unity and coordinated solidarity; this is promoted. EU3 (useful for its citizens): The action targets partner countries abroad, not EU citizens; not applicable. EU4 (avant-garde actor): No claim of pioneering regulation or leadership in future challenges; not applicable. EU5 (global champion of fair causes): The tweet focuses on pandemic aid, not rights/democracy causes; not applicable. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): It highlights EU’s global contribution by redirecting large funds to support partner countries in the fight against coronavirus, fitting development/cooperation globally; this is promoted. Final determination: EU2 and EU6.
